name: Anays Jewelry & Pawn
description_short: Family-owned jewelry and pawn shop in Orlando serving the community since 2015, offering pawn loans, jewelry sales, and professional repair services with bilingual staff.
description_long:
Anays Jewelry & Pawn is a family-run pawn and jewelry business founded in 2015 by Nelson and operated alongside his wife Magalis and daughters Anays and Nelsa from their location in Meadow Woods Plaza, Orlando. The business was established with a mission to serve the local community with transparency, integrity, and personal care, emphasizing family values as the foundation of their operations.

The company offers three primary service lines: pawn loans that allow customers to access cash while retaining ownership of items, the ability to sell jewelry and items outright for fair valuations with instant payment, and professional jewelry repair and restoration services. Their repair services include jewelry restoration, professional watch care, battery replacement, testing, and resizing. The business maintains a curated collection of jewelry for retail sale and offers complimentary repair consultations.

What distinguishes Anays Jewelry & Pawn is their emphasis on personalized, family-oriented service combined with decades of industry expertise in the gold and precious metals sector. The team is bilingual, serving customers in both English and Spanish. Customer reviews consistently highlight the fairness of valuations, the warmth and knowledge of staff, and the quality of repair work. The business has achieved a 5-star rating on Google Reviews with testimonials praising both the owner Nelson and the overall customer experience.

The company operates as a traditional pawn shop with secondary jewelry retail and repair functions. While they maintain strong local reputation and personalized service, they are a single-location business without the scale or technological infrastructure of larger competitors. Like all pawn operations, loan terms and valuations are subject to individual negotiation and the nature of items pledged.
pros: Family-owned since 2015 with decades of expertise in gold and precious metals industry
Bilingual staff serving customers in English and Spanish
Consistent 5-star Google Reviews praising fairness, transparency, and personal service
Complimentary repair consultations and professional jewelry restoration services
Pawn loans allow customers to access cash while retaining ownership of items
Multiple revenue options: pawn loans, direct sales, and repair services
Established reputation for treating customers as neighbors with transparency and integrity
cons: Single-location business in Meadow Woods Plaza limits accessibility for non-local customers
No online pawn loan application or valuation process mentioned on website
Limited information about loan terms, interest rates, and repayment conditions
No details provided about hours of operation or contact phone number on main pages
Pawn loan valuations are subject to individual negotiation with no transparent pricing structure published
best_for: Orlando-area residents needing quick cash against jewelry or valuables with ownership retention
Customers seeking professional jewelry repair and restoration with personalized service
Spanish-speaking customers preferring bilingual pawn and jewelry services
People looking to sell jewelry directly with fair valuations and instant payment
diagnosis: Anays Jewelry & Pawn is best for Orlando-area residents seeking quick cash through pawn loans or direct jewelry sales with personalized, family-oriented service and professional repair expertise. The main caveat is that as a single-location business, they are only accessible to customers in the Orlando area, and the website lacks transparent information about loan terms, rates, and specific hours of operation.
services: Pawn loans against jewelry and personal items
Direct sale of items for fair valuations with instant payment
Curated jewelry collection for retail purchase
Bilingual customer service in English and Spanish
